red_flags.issue: Published ISCA 2025 hardware paper integrating KV quantization engines + memory management into LLM accelerator DMA. Uses threshold-based online-offline hybrid quantization similar to LASSO beta vs beta* comparison.
differentiators: Targets GPU serving, not CPU-native inference
red_flags.action: Must cite and explicitly differentiate in related work

red_flags.issue: Already cited. Cascade pruning+quantization hardware. Overlaps combined eviction+quantization approach.
differentiators: CIM chiplet not SRAM page manager

red_flags.issue: Three 2025 ASIC papers implement FlashAttention hardware, overlapping LASSO LACU block.
differentiators: All datacenter 28nm, no KV compression, no eviction
LASSO LACU is one block in larger pipeline
red_flags.action: Cite all three, note LASSO uses standard online softmax as most generalizable at 130nm

red_flags.issue: Both apply Hadamard rotations to KV caches for 4-bit quantization. WHT on KV entries is shared idea.
differentiators: Apply to full model not KV alone
red_flags.action: Cite and note LASSO 32-element multiplier-free butterfly is architecturally distinct

red_flags.issue: Targets ZCU104 (same LASSO FPGA platform), achieves 95% bandwidth utilization.
differentiators: No KV compression — LASSO is complementary (reduces BW needed, Hummingbird maximizes utilization of remaining BW)
red_flags.action: Cite if published before submission, position as complementary

gap_analysis: First LLM KV cache coprocessor on SKY130 open-source PDK (no prior peer-reviewed paper found)
First hardware combining WHT+Lloyd-Max quantization + dual-signal eviction + hardware PTE + FlashAttention tiling in one chip
CPU-native inference target (all competitors target GPU serving or standalone inference SoC)
Multiplier-free 5-stage butterfly WHT inside dedicated KV compression ASIC block
Dual-signal eviction (Ct + Ht) with Cohen's d validation — no prior eviction work uses this statistical framework
positioning: LASSO is the first open-source ASIC KV-cache coprocessor that integrates multiplier-free WHT+Lloyd-Max quantization, dual-signal entropy-concentration eviction, hardware paged SRAM management, and FlashAttention-style tiled attention in a single chip targeting CPU-native LLM inference on SKY130 130nm.

high_priority_citations.title: KIVI: A Tuning-Free Asymmetric 2bit Quantization for KV Cache
high_priority_citations.relevance: Motivates LASSO group-adaptive INT4/INT8 scheme; shows asymmetric key/value treatment

high_priority_citations.title: KVQuant: Towards 10 Million Context Length LLM Inference with KV Cache Quantization
high_priority_citations.relevance: Non-uniform NUQ (analogous to Lloyd-Max) for KV; validates optimality of non-uniform codebook

high_priority_citations.title: Oaken: Fast and Efficient LLM Serving with Online-Offline Hybrid KV Cache Quantization
high_priority_citations.relevance: Closest hardware competitor — GPU DMA KV quantization engine

high_priority_citations.title: QuaRot: Outlier-Free 4-Bit Inference in Rotated LLMs
high_priority_citations.relevance: Fixed Hadamard rotation for KV outlier suppression — software analog of LASSO WHT

high_priority_citations.title: SpinQuant: LLM Quantization with Learned Rotations
high_priority_citations.relevance: Learned rotation vs LASSO fixed WHT tradeoff

high_priority_citations.title: WUSH: Near-Optimal Adaptive Transforms for LLM Quantization
high_priority_citations.relevance: Theoretical near-optimality of WHT-based transforms — strongest theoretical backing for LASSO KVE design

high_priority_citations.title: Scissorhands: Exploiting the Persistence of Importance Hypothesis for LLM KV Cache Compression
high_priority_citations.relevance: Persistence-of-importance hypothesis underlying LASSO TIU scoring

high_priority_citations.title: DuoAttention: Efficient Long-Context LLM Inference with Retrieval and Streaming Heads
high_priority_citations.relevance: Streaming head = attention sink bypass — validates LASSO TIU sink bypass

high_priority_citations.title: Efficient Memory Management for Large Language Model Serving with PagedAttention
high_priority_citations.relevance: Direct architectural antecedent of LASSO MHC hardware page table

high_priority_citations.title: FLASH-D: FlashAttention with Hidden Softmax Division
H-FA: A Hybrid Floating-Point and Logarithmic Approach to Hardware Accelerated FlashAttention
high_priority_citations.relevance: Log-domain FlashAttention ASIC — LACU design-space comparison

high_priority_citations.title: Low-Cost FlashAttention with Fused Exponential and Multiplication Hardware Operators
high_priority_citations.relevance: ExpMul ASIC operator — motivates LASSO LACU integer-only approach

high_priority_citations.title: LlamaF: An Efficient Llama2 Architecture Accelerator on Embedded FPGAs
high_priority_citations.relevance: ZCU102 LLM inference baseline — same FPGA platform as LASSO validation

high_priority_citations.title: Hummingbird: A Smaller and Faster Large Language Model Accelerator on Embedded FPGA
high_priority_citations.relevance: ZCU104 SOTA (same platform) — LASSO is complementary coprocessor

high_priority_citations.title: Ada-KV: Optimizing KV Cache Eviction by Adaptive Budget Allocation for Attention Heads
high_priority_citations.relevance: Theoretical proof that concentration is correct optimization target for eviction — validates LASSO TIU Ct signal
